description:
Get the free prompts from the video here: https://www.skool.com/tech-snack/classroom/0ca89703?md=dc5d1bed0d134b30963ced22f163d811

In this video I show you an awesome system for using Google Stitch's new Ideate function to build UX

⌚Timestamps:
02:05 - Inside Google Stitch's new Ideate feature
02:38 - The example app: spaced repetition learning for vibe coders
03:46 - Step 1 - PRD
04:37 - The 3 UX directions Stitch generates
05:25 - Expanding all 3 directions into full screen specs
08:09 - Step 2 - Generate Screens
10:32 - Step 3 - Iterating SCreens
13:00 - How to bring these designs into your local dev environment

🗄️ Resources:
Prompts: https://www.skool.com/tech-snack/classroom/0ca89703?md=dc5d1bed0d134b30963ced22f163d811

Stitch: https://stitch.withgoogle.com/

💪 Who Am I?

My name is Sean... I'm a biotech consultant turned tech bootcamp bro-coder turned tech company sales engineer turned digital marketing entrepreneur turned back into a tech bro entrepreneur.

Learning all I can about AI and trying to communicate some knowledge along the way.

The singularity is near!

👇 My Other social accounts

📸  Instagram:   https://www.instagram.com/seankochel/
🐦  X/Twitter:  https://x.com/IAmSeanKochel
👨‍💻  Linkedin:   https://www.linkedin.com/in/sean-kochel/
🎥  Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/realseankochel

chapters.title: Inside Google Stitch's new Ideate feature
The example app: spaced repetition learning for vibe coders
Expanding all 3 directions into full screen specs
How to bring these designs into your local dev environment

fulltitle: I Found the Fastest Way to Get Great App UX
